items.title: Microsoft says Copilot's agentic features in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are now generally available and enabled by default for 365 Copilot and 365 Premium (Sumit Chauhan/Microsoft 365 Blog)
items.title_original: Microsoft says Copilot's agentic features in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are now generally available and enabled by default for 365 Copilot and 365 Premium (Sumit Chauhan/Microsoft 365 Blog)
items.title_en: Microsoft says Copilot's agentic features in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are now generally available and enabled by default for 365 Copilot and 365 Premium (Sumit Chauhan/Microsoft 365 Blog)
items.title_zh: 微软表示，Copilot 在 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 中的代理功能现已普遍可用，并默认为 365 Copilot 和 365 Premium 启用（Sumit Chauhan/Microsoft 365 博客）
items.title_bilingual: 微软表示，Copilot 在 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 中的代理功能现已普遍可用，并默认为 365 Copilot 和 365 Premium 启用（Sumit Chauhan/Microsoft 365 博客） / Microsoft says Copilot's agentic features in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint are now generally available and enabled by default for 365 Copilot and 365 Premium (Sumit Chauhan/Microsoft 365 Blog)

items.title: A poll of 4,000 workers in the US and the UK finds that the highest-earning and most experienced workers are adopting AI in their jobs far faster than others (Financial Times)
items.title_original: A poll of 4,000 workers in the US and the UK finds that the highest-earning and most experienced workers are adopting AI in their jobs far faster than others (Financial Times)
items.title_en: A poll of 4,000 workers in the US and the UK finds that the highest-earning and most experienced workers are adopting AI in their jobs far faster than others (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 对美国和英国 4,000 名员工进行的一项民意调查发现，收入最高、经验最丰富的员工在工作中采用人工智能的速度远远快于其他人（《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 对美国和英国 4,000 名员工进行的一项民意调查发现，收入最高、经验最丰富的员工在工作中采用人工智能的速度远远快于其他人（《金融时报》） / A poll of 4,000 workers in the US and the UK finds that the highest-earning and most experienced workers are adopting AI in their jobs far faster than others (Financial Times)

items.title: Report: China's 360 Digital Security Group has uncovered ~1,000 previously unknown vulnerabilities, including in Microsoft's Office, using an AI-powered agent (Ryan Gallagher/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: Report: China's 360 Digital Security Group has uncovered ~1,000 previously unknown vulnerabilities, including in Microsoft's Office, using an AI-powered agent (Ryan Gallagher/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 报告：中国 360 数字安全集团使用人工智能代理发现了约 1,000 个以前未知的漏洞，包括 Microsoft Office 中的漏洞（Ryan Gallagher/Bloomberg）
items.title_bilingual: 报告：中国 360 数字安全集团使用人工智能代理发现了约 1,000 个以前未知的漏洞，包括 Microsoft Office 中的漏洞（Ryan Gallagher/Bloomberg） / Report: China's 360 Digital Security Group has uncovered ~1,000 previously unknown vulnerabilities, including in Microsoft's Office, using an AI-powered agent (Ryan Gallagher/Bloomberg)

items.title: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick says Nvidia has yet to sell H200 chips to Chinese companies and that the Chinese government has not approved such purchases (Alexandra Alper/Reuters)
items.title_original: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick says Nvidia has yet to sell H200 chips to Chinese companies and that the Chinese government has not approved such purchases (Alexandra Alper/Reuters)
items.title_en: US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick says Nvidia has yet to sell H200 chips to Chinese companies and that the Chinese government has not approved such purchases (Alexandra Alper/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 美国商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克表示，英伟达尚未向中国公司出售 H200 芯片，而且中国政府尚未批准此类采购（Alexandra Alper/路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 美国商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克表示，英伟达尚未向中国公司出售 H200 芯片，而且中国政府尚未批准此类采购（Alexandra Alper/路透社） / US Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick says Nvidia has yet to sell H200 chips to Chinese companies and that the Chinese government has not approved such purchases (Alexandra Alper/Reuters)

items.title: TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 台积电表示，为了节省资金，将推迟在 2029 年之前使用 ASML 最先进的高数值孔径 EUV 机器（每台成本高达 3.5 亿欧元）进行芯片生产（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 台积电表示，为了节省资金，将推迟在 2029 年之前使用 ASML 最先进的高数值孔径 EUV 机器（每台成本高达 3.5 亿欧元）进行芯片生产（彭博社） / TSMC says it will hold off on using ASML's most advanced high-NA EUV machines, costing upwards of €350M apiece, for chip production through 2029 to save money (Bloomberg)

items.title: US child safety group NCMEC received 1.5M reports of suspected CSAM with ties to AI in 2025, a significant surge compared to 67,000 in 2024 and 4,700 in 2023 (Bloomberg)

items.title_zh: 美国儿童安全组织 NCMEC 到 2025 年收到 150 万份疑似与人工智能有关的 CSAM 报告，较 2024 年的 67,000 份和 2023 年的 4,700 份大幅增加（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 美国儿童安全组织 NCMEC 到 2025 年收到 150 万份疑似与人工智能有关的 CSAM 报告，较 2024 年的 67,000 份和 2023 年的 4,700 份大幅增加（彭博社） / US child safety group NCMEC received 1.5M reports of suspected CSAM with ties to AI in 2025, a significant surge compared to 67,000 in 2024 and 4,700 in 2023 (Bloomberg)
